# nomad_acl_role (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "nomad_acl_role" "example" {
  id = "aa534e09-6a07-0a45-2295-a7f77063d429"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The ACL Role unique identifier.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description for the ACL role.
- `name` (String) Unique name of the ACL role.
- `policies` (Set of Object) The list of policies applied to the role. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--policies))

<a id="nestedatt--policies"></a>
### Nested Schema for `policies`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String)
